entry.title: New: RES26-073 (Honolulu) — INTRO
entry.content:
(FOR CONDEMNATION) PROVIDING FOR THE ACQUISITION OF STORM DRAIN EASEMENTS FOR PUBLIC USE FOR THE KAHALUʻU HOUSE AND GARDEN LOTS, UNIT 3 PROJECT, SITUATED AT KAHALUʻU, KOʻOLAUPOKO, OʻAHU, HAWAIʻI, AND DETERMINING AND DECLARING THE NECESSITY OF THE ACQUISITION BY EMINENT DOMAIN.

Latest action: Introduced.

View on the council site
